name: Get Published Events
script:
events = frappe.get_all(
    "Buzz Event",
    filters={"is_published": 1},
    fields=[
        "name",
        "route",
        "title",
        "banner_image",
        "start_date",
        "venue"
    ]
)

frappe.response["message"] = events

name: Get Event By Route
script:
route = frappe.form_dict.get("route")

event = frappe.get_all(
    "Buzz Event",
    filters={"route": route},
    fields=[
        "name",
        "title",
        "banner_image",
        "start_date",
        "venue"
    ]
)

frappe.response["message"] = event[0] if event else None
